subject.description: A stressed, exhausted marketer in their early 30s.
subject.action: Staring intensely at a computer monitor. The monitor displays a chaotic, overly-generic AI-generated paragraph of text that looks completely unusable, representing 45 minutes of wasted effort.

setting.location: A dimly lit modern office space.

composition.camera_angle: Over-the-shoulder shot, slightly angled to see both the frustrated face and the monitor.
composition.framing: Rule of thirds. MUST follow cropping rules: never cut in flesh, leave headspace (no cutting top of head), full shoulders visible, ample breathing room.

camera_settings.depth_of_field: Low depth of field. The subject is in sharp focus while the background office is blurred.

lighting.type: Harsh, cold light emanating from the computer monitor, contrasting with the dim ambient office light.
lighting.color_grading: Cool tones, high contrast, slightly desaturated to emphasize exhaustion.

negative_prompt: Things that MUST NOT appear: text, watermarks, deformities, bad anatomy, artificial studio lighting, cut off heads, cut flesh.
